title: Ability to Reorder Bookmarks in the Widget
excerpt: Would be great to be able to reorder the bookmarks in a widget. Right now, I have to delete bookmarks, and recreate them in the order I want them ie alphabetical.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Would be great to be able to reorder the bookmarks in a widget. Right now, I have to delete bookmarks, and recreate them in the order I want them ie alphabetical.
